title: A Long Day at the Office
content: By the middle of the afternoon, Daniel already felt completely exhausted. His day at the office had started with technical problems, followed by several difficult meetings and an endless number of emails. Every time he finished one task, two more appeared immediately. During lunch, he barely had enough time to eat before returning to his desk. Outside the office windows, the weather looked beautiful, which made Daniel wish he were anywhere else. Finally, after finishing the last report of the day, he shut down his computer and leaned back in his chair with relief. The moment he stepped outside into the cool evening air, the stress slowly began to disappear.
